heading: Furnishing certain deceptive forms
label: 1692j Furnishing certain deceptive forms
notes: Effective DateSection effective upon the expiration of six months after , see , as added by , set out as a note under .Sept. 20, 1977section 819 of Pub. L. 90–321Pub. L. 95–109section 1692 of this title

children.label: a
children.text: It is unlawful to design, compile, and furnish any form knowing that such form would be used to create the false belief in a consumer that a person other than the creditor of such consumer is participating in the collection of or in an attempt to collect a debt such consumer allegedly owes such creditor, when in fact such person is not so participating.

children.label: b
children.text: Any person who violates this section shall be liable to the same extent and in the same manner as a debt collector is liable under for failure to comply with a provision of this subchapter.section 1692k of this title
